headline: SpaceX shareholders approve 5-for-1 stock split ahead of IPO, reports Bloomberg
summary: Investing.com -- A majority of SpaceX shareholders have approved a 5-for-1 stock split recommended by the company’s board of directors, according to a Bloomberg News report citing people familiar with the matter.

content.title: SpaceX shareholders approve 5-for-1 stock split ahead of IPO, reports Bloomberg
content.summary: Investing.com -- A majority of SpaceX shareholders have approved a 5-for-1 stock split recommended by the company’s board of directors, according to a Bloomberg News report citing people familiar with the matter.

headline: Assessing Lockheed Martin (LMT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Why Lockheed Martin (LMT) Is On Investors’ Radar Today Lockheed Martin (LMT) is back in focus for investors after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 16% over the past month and roughly 21% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Lockheed Martin. That recent 16% decline in the past month and 21% drop over 3 months sit alongside a 3.81% year to date share price gain and a 52.52% five year total shareholder return. This suggests shorter term momentum has cooled while...

headline: Pentagon Defends Trump’s Golden Dome After $1 Trillion Estimate
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The official leading President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome contested an estimate that the highly secretive missile defense shield would cost six times more than forecast, raising questions around the true price tag of the administration’s project.Most Read from BloombergWinners and Losers From Trump and Xi’s Beijing Summit TalksHormuz Oil Flows Creep Higher as More Supertankers ExitWhat Is The Thucydides Trap and Why Did Xi Raise It With Trump?Iran’s Kharg Island Oil Jetties Empty
